cs-support.label: Customer Support / CS Operations
cs-support.description: For hiring managers and teams looking for customer support, technical support, or support operations expertise.

implementation.label: Implementation & Onboarding
implementation.description: For roles focused on configuring, rolling out, or onboarding customers onto products and systems.

ops-strategy.label: Operations & Strategy
ops-strategy.description: For roles in business operations, project management, people operations, and organisational strategy.

builder-technical.label: Builder / Technical
builder-technical.description: For roles requiring demonstrated technical building — AI tools, frontend development, and prompt engineering.

creator-lore.label: Creator / Content
creator-lore.description: For roles or partnerships in content creation, tech journalism, and creator tooling.
